title: json_skip_number accepts bare '-' (RFC 8259 violation)
description: json_skip_number (core lib:359-388) consumes '-' then immediately enters the digit loop — no check that at least one digit follows. RFC 8259 §6 requires an integer part after the optional minus. Input '{"bad":-,"pw":"x"}' does not trigger an error; extract_field("pw") succeeds. Practical impact: invalid JSON secrets containing a bare '-' value in a non-target field are silently accepted rather than returning DecodeFailed. Fix: return Err if no digit follows the '-'.
